# Jupiter FE requirements

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: May 14, 2024 7:17 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: May 23, 2024 12:54 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

Because we are removing bottom NAV and My account section, we need to move entry point of functionalities to main dashboard, following PRD covers those cases.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

1. User should be able to see transaction history from dashboard.
2. User should be able to manage loan limit from dashboard.
3. User should be able to preclose loan from the dashboard.
    1. When user’s foreclose request is approved, change the text to track closure request. 
4. User should not see the WA chat option in the “Need help?” bottom sheet. (Read from the B2B CS config, if WA=Yes)

## Other Requirements

1. Change icon of the “Need help?” pill. 
2. Webhook to send repayment success webhook. 
3. JSON link: [https://jsongrid.com/?data=c5cceedf-f517-462e-81f9-9ffb32bc7649](https://jsongrid.com/?data=c5cceedf-f517-462e-81f9-9ffb32bc7649)
    1. showCSPill: This will enable or disable the “Need help?” CTA across the app. 
    2. csPillData: 
        1. callData: CS phonenumber for the platform
        2. customIconUrl: S3 link of the icon beside “Need help?”
        3. emailData: CS email ID for the platfom
        4. waData: WhatsApp redirection link will be change with this number. 
        5. showCall: Hide or show the call option in the Need help bottom sheet.
        6. showEmail: Hide or show the email option in the Need help bottom sheet.
        7. ShowWA: Hide or show the WA option in the Need help bottom sheet.

# **Appendix**

User actions

1. Withdrawal
2. Repayment
3. My account
    1. Foreclosure
    2. Account details:
        1. User details (Name, Mobile number, Email ID, PAN)
        2. Bank details (Bank name, IFSC, Account number)
        3. Edit mobile/email/bank (Not developed yet)
    3. About us
    4. FAQs
    5. Logout
4. Manage limit:
    1. Enhancement
    2. Margin pledge
    3. Details of pledged portfolio
        1. Pledge more
        2. Remove pledge
        3. Pledge history
5. Transactions:
    1. Transaction history
    2. Email transaction history

## Meeting notes
